title: Voxel1's Tree Tweaks
description: subtly tweaks trees to make them more interesting and immersive
body:
**you can use distibute these assets as long as you give credit to me and the origninal creators. do not claim it as your own work unless you give credit and modify it in some way.**

This pack was almost entirely made by me other that one assets from the [Grass+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grass+) pack which was used as a template to match the look ok the Creaking's head

This pack:

- Add a small edge to all the logs in minecraft (not the nether stems) which has the same shape as the edge from the [Grass+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grass+) pack's grass block expect they cull a differently and appear on both sides of the log.
- Add brown mushroom fans to the side of birch logs

Anyways, I hope u enjoy and pls check my other packs
